name: agentcore-gateway

notes: Use type http/url + headers Authorization Bearer ${env:BIFROST_MCP_VIRTUAL_KEY}
Replace [mcp_servers.*] baseline entries with a single agentcore-gateway HTTP server while preserving Codex-managed extras such as node_repl and plugin-provided MCP servers
Use bearer_token_env_var = "BIFROST_MCP_VIRTUAL_KEY" so Codex constructs Authorization: Bearer without materializing the secret or treating an env placeholder as a static header
Map the 300-second contract timeout to startup_timeout_sec = 300 and tool_timeout_sec = 300; do not emit the unsupported generic timeout_seconds field
Merge into mcpServers if present; do not invent unrelated top-level keys
If env expansion unsupported, cutover may materialize VK from User env into live config only
C:\Users\ynotf\.mavis is a junction to C:\Users\ynotf\.minimax (MiniMax Code data root)
MiniMax Agent Classic App ID com.minimax.agent-classic
Executable D:\Apps\MiniMaxAgent-Classic\MiniMax Agent.exe with --user-data-dir=C:\Users\ynotf\AppData\Roaming\MiniMaxAgent-Classic
No local mcp.json; enroll agentcore-gateway via Matrix cloud custom MCP UI per ide-profiles/minimax-classic/MCP_ENROLLMENT_UI.md
Materialize BIFROST_MCP_VIRTUAL_KEY bearer in protected live UI only
On this workstation C:\Users\ynotf\.mavis is a junction to C:\Users\ynotf\.minimax (MiniMax Code); not a separate Mavis application install
Materialize VK into live config only when env headers unsupported
Cherry persists MCP under redux key persist:cherry-studio → mcp.servers in Local Storage LevelDB
Cherry does not expand ${env:} headers; scripts/cherry/enroll_agentcore_gateway.py materializes BIFROST_MCP_VIRTUAL_KEY into the live store only
Map contract timeout_seconds=300 to Cherry server.timeout=300
Use type streamableHttp and baseUrl http://127.0.0.1:8080/mcp
Governed Agent id agentcore-workspace-agent mounts only agentcore-gateway; client_key=cherry-studio agent_key=cherry-studio-assistant
Sanitized renderer: renderers/gateway-clients/cherry-studio.json — never commit resolved VK
Fully quit Cherry before LevelDB enrollment; restart after enroll for tools/list
Cursor's canonical active MCP file is C:\Users\ynotf\.cursor\mcp.json; project-level gateway entries are rollback-only or drift unless explicitly authorized.
Project-specific behavior is selected through agentcore-project-router, not duplicate per-repo gateway entries.
Do not edit OpenClaw/ClawX as part of Bifrost IDE cutover.
Swarm product installs remain untouched; Swarm MCP entries are removed from non-Swarm IDE baselines during cutover.
Never commit resolved virtual key values.
